changesProposed.name: Fervo Energy

verified.name: Fervo Energy
verified.description: Geothermal energy company that generates electricity through enhanced geothermal systems using horizontal drilling techniques. Fervo develops next-generation geothermal projects including Project Red and Cape Station.
verified.notes: IPO announced and priced in May 2026 (source 0 newsroom section). Wikipedia entry notes company type as 'Private' but website shows multiple IPO announcements from May 2026. Most recent funding round was $462 million Series E in November 2025 led by B Capital (source 2).

changesProposed.name: Nuro

verified.name: Nuro
verified.description: Autonomous vehicle technology company that develops Level 4 self-driving systems. Founded by engineers from Google's self-driving program, Nuro pivoted in September 2024 from custom delivery vehicles to licensing its Nuro Driver autonomy platform to automakers and mobility providers.
verified.notes: Company pivoted from autonomous delivery vehicles to licensing L4 autonomy technology in September 2024. Series E funding rounds: $106M opened April 2025, $97M closed August 2025, $203M raised August 2025 at $6B valuation. Partnership with Uber and Lucid Motors to deploy 20,000+ robotaxis.

changesProposed.name: OpenAI

current.name: OpenAI
current.founder: Sam Altman, Greg Brockman, Ilya Sutskever

verified.name: OpenAI
verified.description: American artificial intelligence research organization that developed the GPT family of large language models, DALL-E series of text-to-image models, and Sora series of text-to-video models. OpenAI released ChatGPT in November 2022, which catalyzed widespread interest in generative AI.
verified.notes: Founded December 8, 2015 as nonprofit; transitioned to for-profit capped entity in 2019. In October 2025, conducted $6.6 billion share sale that valued company at $500 billion (most recent valuation per source 0). Wikipedia lists 11 founders including Elon Musk; database entry listed only 3. Initial capital pledges of $1 billion significantly lagged actual collection ($133.2 million by 2021).

changes.current: Sam Altman, Greg Brockman, Ilya Sutskever

changesProposed.name: SpaceX

verified.name: SpaceX
verified.description: American aerospace and artificial intelligence company that designs and manufactures rockets, spacecraft, and satellite constellations. Founded by Elon Musk in 2002 with the goal of decreasing space launch costs and enabling human settlement on Mars.
verified.notes: Wikipedia states SpaceX 'is expected to have an initial public offering (IPO) in 2026' and notes 'a 2025 offer to buy internal shares valued SpaceX at $800 billion'. Database entry claimed IPO at $1.5T valuation and Series G stage, but sources do not support these claims. Source [0] is a domain parking page and provides no company information. Total funding amount cannot be verified from provided sources.
